title: SocraticTurn
description: Output of a single professor-turn in a Socratic drill or cold-call session (spec §5.4, §5.6). The full session is a list of turns plus user answers.

question.description: The professor's next question, cold-call style.

intent.description: Why this question now — drives downstream grading.

react_to_previous.description: 1–2 sentence reaction to the student's last answer, if any. Null on the opening turn.

escalation_level.description: 1 = warm-up, 5 = hardest. Used for cold-call time pressure.
